_meta.description: Multi-hop facts: each can be reconstructed from a COMBINATION of other stored (context) facts, optionally plus world knowledge. After raw deletion, recovery can occur by RE-DERIVATION even with zero residual survival. 'co_delete_required' lists the context-fact IDs that must also be removed to close the stored re-derivation path. 'rederivation_basis' = 'stored' means co-deleting those context facts drives recoverability to ~0; 'stored+world' means a parametric residual rho remains. 'delete_value' = the target's OWN surface forms (what a deletion removes / residual-survival check); 'probe_value' = the broader recovery criterion for re-derivation (an approximation from operands still counts as recovery). All persons are fictional.

facts.subject: Alice Chen
facts.text: Alice Chen's approximate monthly salary is SGD 8,500.
facts.utterance: My pay is around SGD 8,500 a month, for budgeting.
facts.question: What is the user's approximate monthly salary?
facts.entailment_note: C001 (Senior SWE at Google SG) + C002 (that band is SGD 8,000-9,000) jointly pin the value. Both operands are stored, so co-deleting C001+C002 removes the path entirely (rho ~ 0).

facts.subject: Bob Tan
facts.text: Bob Tan is 35 years old.
facts.utterance: Bob Tan just turned 35 this year.
facts.question: How old is Bob Tan?
facts.entailment_note: C003 (born 1991) + world knowledge (current year 2026) => age 35. Stored operand is the birth year; the current year is parametric, so a small rho remains if the adversary later learns the birth year by other means.

facts.subject: Carol Lim
facts.text: Carol Lim has an elevated cardiovascular disease risk.
facts.utterance: I'm a bit worried about Carol Lim's heart health; her cardiovascular disease risk is elevated.
facts.question: Is Carol Lim's cardiovascular disease risk elevated, or normal/low?
facts.entailment_note: C005 (LDL 195 mg/dL) + C006 (1-pack-a-day smoker) + medical world knowledge => elevated CVD risk. The clinical inference is parametric, so rho > 0 even after co-deletion.

facts.subject: Alice Chen
facts.text: Alice Chen lives in the Bishan area.
facts.utterance: We're a Bishan family these days.
facts.question: In which residential neighbourhood or area does the user live?
facts.entailment_note: C007 (son attends Catholic High School) + world knowledge (CHS is in Bishan) + C008 (walks son to school daily) => lives near Bishan. The school's location is parametric world knowledge.

facts.subject: Bob Tan
facts.text: Bob Tan's monthly home-loan repayment is about SGD 3,200.
facts.utterance: Bob Tan was saying his housing loan costs him roughly SGD 3,200 a month.
facts.question: Approximately how much is Bob Tan's monthly home-loan repayment?
facts.entailment_note: C009 (SGD 640k loan, 25-year tenure) + C010 (3.5% p.a.) + amortization formula (world knowledge) => ~SGD 3,200/month. Operands stored; the computation is parametric.

facts.subject: Carol Lim
facts.text: Carol Lim is most likely vegetarian.
facts.utterance: I think Carol Lim has gone fully vegetarian.
facts.question: Does Carol Lim eat meat, or is she vegetarian?
facts.entailment_note: C011 (never orders meat) + C012 (only plant-based food at home) + commonsense => vegetarian. Operands stored; the abductive step is parametric.
